title: Async code in header causes build failure
symptom: Injecting async code into the project header results in a build failure, while the same code works when executed after a button press.
not_this_if: Only using synchronous code in the header
Running code as an action after a button press
root_cause: The build process may not support async code execution in the header due to timing issues or the way scripts are loaded and executed. This can lead to incomplete builds when async functions are present.
fix_steps: Remove async functions from the header script
Use synchronous code or refactor to execute after page load
agent_instruction: Refactor the header script to remove async functions and ensure it runs synchronously.
